inputs.label: Total Outstanding Shares
inputs.businessContext: Current total number of shares issued and outstanding before the new issuance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current total number of shares issued and outstanding before the new issuance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni ihraç öncesi mevcut toplam tedavüldeki hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Gesamtzahl der ausgegebenen und ausstehenden Aktien vor der Neuemission.

inputs.label: New Shares Issued
inputs.businessContext: Number of new shares to be created and issued in the funding round.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of new shares to be created and issued in the funding round.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fonlama turunda oluşturulacak ve ihraç edilecek yeni hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der neuen Aktien, die in der Finanzierungsrunde geschaffen und ausgegeben werden.

inputs.label: Investor's Current Shares
inputs.businessContext: Number of shares currently owned by the investor before the round.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of shares currently owned by the investor before the round.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımcının tur öncesinde sahip olduğu hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Aktien, die der Investor vor der Runde besitzt.

inputs.label: Investor's New Shares Purchased
inputs.businessContext: Number of new shares the investor purchases in this round (0 if not participating).

label_i18n.tr: Yatırımcının Satın Aldığı Yeni Hisse Sayısı

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of new shares the investor purchases in this round (0 if not participating).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımcının bu turda satın aldığı yeni hisse sayısı (katılmıyorsa 0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der neuen Aktien, die der Investor in dieser Runde kauft (0 bei Nichtteilnahme).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
